nasb.text: When you set your eyes on it, it is gone. For wealth certainly makes itself wings Like an eagle that flies toward the heavens.

esv.text: When your eyes light on it, it is gone, for suddenly it sprouts wings, flying like an eagle toward heaven.

cnv.text: 你的眼睛注視在錢財上，錢財卻不見了， 因為錢財必長起翅膀， 如鷹飛往天上。

ccb.text: 钱财眨眼之间消逝无踪， 它必长出翅膀如鹰飞去。

csbs.text: 你的目光飞向财富，它却不见了； 因为财富必定长出翅膀，如鹰飞向天空。
